name: PR-SOURCES.yaml registry rejects a malformed yaml syntax with a parse-error message
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'sources: [unclosed\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/validate-registry.sh" --registry .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -qi 'parse' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
